case_title: KATRINA R. HAVERKAMP VS. WILLIAMS COLE INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAVERKAMP, KATRINA R. AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS COLE INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA ATTORNEY'S DIVERSIFIED JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAVERKAMP, KATRINA R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS COLE INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA ATTORNEY'S DIVERSIFIED $6,075.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,300.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
